mapper.insert: insert into reservation (space_id, guest_id, start_date, end_date, total_price, status) values (#{spaceId}, #{guestId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{totalPrice}, #{status})
mapper.select: select r.id , r.space_id, r.guest_id, r.start_date, r.end_date, r.total_price, r.status, s.title as space_name from reservation r join space s on r.space_id = s.id and s.is_deleted = 0 where r.guest_id = #{guestId} and r.is_deleted = 0 order by r.created_at desc

select r.id , r.space_id, r.guest_id, r.start_date, r.end_date, r.total_price, r.status, s.title as space_name, u.name as guest_name from reservation r join space s on s.id = r.space_id and s.is_deleted = 0 join user u on u.id = r.guest_id and u.is_deleted = 0 where s.host_id = #{id} and r.is_deleted =0 order by r.id desc

select r.id, r.space_id, r.guest_id, r.start_date, r.end_date, r.total_price, r.status, s.title as space_name, u.name as guest_name from reservation r join space s on r.space_id = s.id and s.is_deleted = 0 join user u on r.guest_id = u.id and u.is_deleted = 0 where r.id = #{id} and r.is_deleted = 0
